scripts.setup: npm --prefix local-receiver ci && npm --prefix app ci
scripts.test:active-soak: npm --prefix app run build && node scripts/test-active-client-soak.mjs
scripts.check: npm run setup && node --check scripts/start-local.mjs && npm --prefix local-receiver run check && npm --prefix app run build && npm --prefix app run test:endpoints && npm --prefix app run test:bundle-urls && npm --prefix app run test:speech-dispatch && npm --prefix app run test:memory && npm --prefix app run test:startup-prompt && npm --prefix app run test:history && npm --prefix app run test:history:current
